case_title: DONI MALAISE VS. BAYDELTA MARITIME, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MALAISE, DONI AS TO DEFENDANT BAYDELTA MARITIME, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-09-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 (AMENDING DEFENDANT'S NAME) FILED BY MALAISE, DONI AS TO DEFENDANT BAYDELTA MARITIME, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-09-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-24-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT BAYDELTA MARITIME, INC.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MALAISE, DONI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BAYDELTA MARITIME, INC. (THE TESTIMONY AND EVIDENCE PRESENTED AT TRIAL WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM FOR DAMAGES AGAINST THESE DEFENDANTS.)
